scripts.setup: for f in .env .env.local .env.development .env.production; do [ -f "$CONDUCTOR_ROOT_PATH/$f" ] && ln -sf "$CONDUCTOR_ROOT_PATH/$f" "$f"; done; [ -f "$CONDUCTOR_ROOT_PATH/.claude/settings.local.json" ] && mkdir -p .claude && ln -sf "$CONDUCTOR_ROOT_PATH/.claude/settings.local.json" .claude/settings.local.json; [ -f package.json ] && npm install --prefer-offline --no-audit 2>/dev/null; true
